description_long: This is a modern suburban house surrounded by a dense arrangement of coniferous and deciduous trees, providing a sense of privacy and integration with nature. The house features a combination of flat and low-pitched gable roofs, with a prominent driveway leading to a garage at the front. The exterior is primarily light-colored, likely finished in stucco or painted siding, with large windows that allow ample natural light into the interior. A backyard area includes a patio and what appears to be a swimming pool, partially visible through the trees. The landscaping is carefully designed, with a mix of manicured shrubs, trees, and open lawn spaces. The overall layout suggests a single-family residence with a focus on outdoor living and visual connection to the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, light-colored house with flat and gable roofs, surrounded by dense trees and featuring a driveway, garage, and backyard patio with a pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage entrance, and main entryway, framed by dense trees.
description_view_1: Side-rear view highlighting the backyard patio, pool area, and extensive tree coverage.
description_view_2: Rear view with the house partially obscured by trees, emphasizing the secluded backyard.
description_view_3: Top-down rear view showing the full extent of the backyard, patio, pool, and surrounding trees.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a covered porch, single front door, and adjacent garage, framed by landscaping and a paved driveway.
